memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of arms of van Amstel
IJselmonde
memoryArtifacts.description:
Geschiedenis
Al in 1072 komt de naam Islemunda voor, maar er zijn sporen gevonden van vissen, jagen en landbouw vanaf ongeveer 2500 v.Chr. Deze sporen worden gerekend tot de Vlaardingencultuur.

In 17 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabilia Clementina van Amstel於大約1195年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓時，她的父親Gijsbrecht II van Amstel21歲，母親Bertrande van IJsselstein22歲。她與Willem I van Egmond在荷蘭努-拉藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1244年4月27日在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德普頓霍福。

zh-hans.Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Netherlands: 荷兰蓋爾德藍德普頓霍福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabilia Clementina van Amstel于大约1195年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓时，她的父亲Gijsbrecht II van Amstel21岁，母亲Bertrande van IJsselstein22岁。她与Willem I van Egmond在荷兰努-拉藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1244年4月27日在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在荷兰蓋爾德藍德普頓霍福。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

Italian: altered form of Mabilia, from the old female personal name Mabile, from Latin Amabilis.

nameMeanings.name: Clementina
meanings: A female name formed from Clement.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabilia Clementina van Amstel was born about 1195, in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands, her father, Gijsbrecht II van Amstel, was 21 and her mother, Bertrande van IJsselstein, was 22. She married Willem I van Egmond in North Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 27 April 1244, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabilia Clementina van Amstel est née environ 1195, à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Gijsbrecht II van Amstel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Bertrande van IJsselstein, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Willem I van Egmond à Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1244, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Hoef, Putten, Gueldre, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabilia Clementina van Amstel um 1195 in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gijsbrecht II van Amstel 21 und ihre Mutter Bertrande van IJsselstein 22. Sie hat in Nord-Holland, Niederlande Willem I van Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 27. April 1244 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Hoef, Putten, Geldern, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia Clementina van Amstel è nata il circa 1195 nel Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Gijsbrecht II van Amstel, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Bertrande van IJsselstein, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Willem I van Egmond nel Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 aprile 1244, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabilia Clementina van Amstelが約1195年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンで生まれた時，父Gijsbrecht II van Amstelは21歳，母Bertrande van IJsselsteinは22歳であった。オランダノオルド-hオランドでWillem I van Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1244年4月27日に故郷で50歳で死去し，オランダジェルダーランドプウッテンホーエフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabilia Clementina van Amstel(이)가 대략 1195년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gijsbrecht II van Amstel(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrande van IJsselstein(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드에서 Willem I van Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 4월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 글델랜드 풋텐 호프에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Egmond-Binnen, , North Holland, Netherla: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia Clementina van Amstel nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Gijsbrecht II van Amstel, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Bertrande van IJsselstein, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Willem I van Egmond em Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1244, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Hoef, Putten, Gheldria, Países Baixos.

ro.Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Netherlands: Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabilia Clementina van Amstel родилась около 1195 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Gijsbrecht II van Amstel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Bertrande van IJsselstein, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willem I van Egmond в местности нурд-холланд, Нидерланды. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 27 апреля 1244 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности хоеф, путтен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabilia Clementina van Amstel nació aproximadamente 1195, en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Gijsbrecht II van Amstel, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Bertrande van IJsselstein, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Willem I van Egmond en Noord-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de abril de 1244, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Hoef, Putten, Gelderland, Países Bajos.
